name: Example Notifier
description: Logs events to console when credentials or vulnerabilities are found. Use as a template for building your own plugins.
author: Bjorn Team

log_credentials.label: Log new credentials
log_credentials.help: Log to console when new credentials are discovered

log_vulnerabilities.label: Log new vulnerabilities
log_vulnerabilities.help: Log to console when new vulnerabilities are found

log_actions.label: Log action completions
log_actions.help: Log every action result (can be noisy)
